title: TBD Loadout Export
description: Loadout download: a fixed set of gear slots, each holding a resource_name (from registry-items) or null when empty. Consumed by the mod equip test and the web download. optic/magazine are optional Smart Forge slots (T-068.10) — absent in Phase 1 payloads, ignored by the v1 mod reader.

slot.description: Enfusion ResourceName for the equipped item, or null when the slot is empty.
